LanguageData.RSMF.Designator.ZoneAddShop.Label: Create shop area
LanguageData.RSMF.Designator.ZoneAddShop.Desc: Designate an area used for shop operations. Shop areas may cover buildings, but must be indoors and contain at least storage and a cash register.
LanguageData.RSMF.Zone.Validation.OutdoorCells: There are {count} outdoor cells, for example {cell}.
LanguageData.RSMF.Zone.Validation.MissingStorageServi: Missing storage, service building, and cash register.
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ShopManagement.Label: Shop management
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ShopManagement.Desc: View and manage sale goods and stock status for all storage buildings in this shop area.
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ShopStaff.Label: Staff setup
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ShopStaff.Desc: Open the staff role assignment panel for this shop.
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ToggleZoneVisibility.Label: Hide zone overlay
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ToggleZoneVisibility.Desc: Hide or show the ground color overlay for this shop area. This only affects zone drawing, not opening, restocking, checkout, or customer visits.
LanguageData.RSMF.CashStorage.ThresholdTooltip: Shows current stored silver and the automatic withdrawal threshold. After moving the threshold marker, pawns doing service work will automatically withdraw and haul silver once available silver reaches the threshold.
LanguageData.RSMF.Container.Inspect.Name: Name: {name}
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.RenameContainer.Label: Rename storage
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.RenameContainer.Desc: Set a name for this storage building so it is easier to identify and locate.
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ContainerManagement.Label: Storage management
LanguageData.RSMF.Gizmo.ContainerManagement.Desc: Open the storage management panel to configure sale goods, target stock, and prices.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.Title: Customer review settings
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.EnableReviewsTip: No review snapshots are recorded while disabled.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.RimTalkDetected: RimTalk detected. You can import its current API, model, and key.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.RimTalkNotDetected: RimTalk is not detected. Install and enable RimTalk before importing.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.RimTalkImport.NoActi: RimTalk has no active API config.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.RimTalkImport.Unsupp: RimTalk provider {provider} is not supported for import yet.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.RimTalkImport.NoMode: RimTalk's current config has no usable model.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.MaxReviewRecordsTip: After the limit is reached, the oldest reviews are overwritten. New reviews will still be generated.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.ReplyChanceTip: Reply chance controls retention after the model creates a reply. Extreme praise, criticism, disagreement, or complaints are more likely to keep replies.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.AbsurdNitpickTip: When enabled, only some reviews may let the model write absurd, picky, or unreasonable praise or criticism.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.AbsurdNitpickChanceT: This chance only permits the style in the prompt. It does not splice local templates; missed reviews keep the ordinary forum voice.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.ContextBudgetTip: The stable prompt prefix is sent first to improve provider prefix-cache hits; dynamic customer data is placed last. Values above 0 keep only a small anti-repeat memo and no longer reuse old customer material.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.Result.RequestSuccee: Request test succeeded. Review generation and parsing are available.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.Result.GenerationFai: BaseUrl is reachable, but generation failed. Check the model, key, or gateway JSON support.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.Injector.XmlHint: XML tags only organize input; the model must still return JSON.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.Injector.PlainHint: Compatible with the older plain text prompt node layout.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.Injector.RootXmlInfo: The root prompt is placed in <rootPrompt>, and other nodes are appended by priority as XML-style data blocks. XML is only the input structure and does not change the JSON output requirement.
LanguageData.RSMF.ReviewSettings.Injector.RootPlainIn: The plain text structure keeps the root prompt first, then appends enabled nodes by priority.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Title: Prompt preview
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Note: This uses a sample customer snapshot to preview node structure. Real reviews replace it with actual customer, shop, weather, condition, culture, and shopping data.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.KindDescriptio: Budget range 100-400 silver; queue patience 900-3000 ticks; target goods category Goods_Foods.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.RaceDescriptio: Real race description text appears here.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.BackstoryDetai: Full real backstory descriptions appear here.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Traits: Kind, description: more restrained expression; Abrasive, description: may sound sharp when in a bad mood.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.PersonalityBia: Review naturally based on the actual experience.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Budget: Budget 117 silver, actual payment 96 silver, checkout result: payment completed
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Purchased: Packaged survival meal x4, 96 silver, description: preferred food for long travel.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Service: No service used, checkout result: payment completed
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Environment: Environment reference values: overall 63.4, reputation 53.9, satisfaction 71.7, beauty 6.6.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Cashier: Sample cashier, social 4, social impact 0.93, work speed 0.80.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.CheckoutJob: Customer_PayAtRegister, queue position 1, result payment completed.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Room: Room role shop; size 80 cells; psychologically indoors; temperature 21.0C; beauty 6.6; cleanliness 0.10.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.Weather: Current weather clear; duration 1200 ticks; rain 0.00; snow 0.00; move multiplier 1.00.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.ColonyWealth: Total wealth 52000, items 18000, buildings 24000, pawns 10000, colonists 6.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.ColonyShops: Shop areas 2, valid shops 2, currently open 1, names: Sample shop, medicine stall.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.ColonyLeader: Faction leader: Sample leader, title chief, social 12, backstory sample backstory, traits kind.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.ColonyCulture: Main ideology sample ideology, culture sample culture, member name member, memes collectivist, trade preference.
LanguageData.RSMF.PromptPreview.Sample.RecentReviews: Same-shop recent reviews 1, average 4.0 stars; interactable review: reviewId=preview_review, SampleUser, 4 stars: goods were clear and checkout was fast.
LanguageData.RSMF.AiTerminal.Title: AI debug terminal
LanguageData.RSMF.AiTerminal.RecordCount: {count} in-memory records this game. API keys are not recorded or exported.
LanguageData.RSMF.AiTerminal.SelectRecord: Select a record on the left to view details
LanguageData.RSMF.AiTerminal.CopiedRecordMessage: Current AI debug record copied to clipboard.
LanguageData.RSMF.AiTerminal.ClearLogConfirm: Clear this AI debug log? Generated customer reviews will not be deleted.
LanguageData.RSMF.AiTerminal.ExportSucceeded: AI debug JSON exported, path copied: {path}
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.Status.VendingDisabled: Status: disabled, unpowered, switched off, or out of stock
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.ShopInventoryLine: Storage: {storages} Sale goods: {goodsKinds} In stock: {inStockKinds} Bundles: {comboCount}
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.ShopMetricsLine: Score {score} Reputation {reputation} Satisfaction {satisfaction} Beauty {beauty} Capacity {capacity} Reviews {stars}★/{reviewCount}
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.ShopDemandLine: Traffic {spawn}x Beauty {beauty}x Scale {scale}x Capacity scale {capacityScale}x Effective scale {effectiveScale}
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.CollectibleExchange.Header: This lists currently available exchange shops. Open one to view its shop intro, period progress, and exchange items.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleExchange.EmptyItems: This exchange shop has no configured items.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleExchange.ComponentMissin: Collectible exchange save component is not initialized.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleExchange.LetterText: The {item} you bought from {shop} has arrived by drop pod.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleExchange.ProgressFallbac: No item rotation progress is available.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleExchange.Dialogue.Defaul: {item} is worth a look if you need it.
No rush. The stock is still here.
Deal. The goods will be delivered.
Not enough currency for this exchange.
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.Finance.Chart.Title: Finance charts
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.Storage.NotFoundMessage: No configurable storage found for this shop.
LanguageData.RSMF.Business.Storage.CannotOpenMessage: This storage cannot open the management panel.
LanguageData.RSMF.StaffManager.Title: {shop}'s staff setup
LanguageData.RSMF.StaffManager.RoleListTip: Roles are shown automatically based on buildings and role defs already present in the shop.
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.SelectCategoryFirst: Select a goods category to manage on the left
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.NoCategories: This storage has no available goods categories
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.Header.Name: Item name
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.PendingEvictWarning: ⚠️ Warning: after saving, these items will be removed from storage: {names}
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.PasteConfigDone: Storage config pasted. Save to apply.
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.PasteConfigInvalidCate: The target storage cannot use the copied goods category.
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.AutoTrimNotice: Target amounts were trimmed to the storage capacity limit; {trimmed} excess items were removed.
LanguageData.RSMF.GoodsManager.InvalidCategory: This storage cannot sell that goods category.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.SaveTip: Tip: changes only take effect after clicking "Save"; "Cancel" will discard all changes.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.SaveTip.Schedule: Business hour changes are applied after clicking "Save".
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.SaveTip.Services: Service enablement, prices, and concurrency changes are applied after clicking "Save".
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.NoSaveNeededTip: This page has no draft to apply; unsaved changes on other pages can still be discarded with Cancel.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.AutoTrimNotice: Target amounts were trimmed to the storage capacity limit: {storageCount} storages removed {trimmed} excess entries.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.Header.Name: Item name
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.AutoEstimateTip: Estimate automatically as 90% of the sum of item base prices
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.ComboSavedAndNew: Bundle "{comboName}" saved; a new empty bundle is ready.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.ComboGoodsHeader: Goods on sale (check to add to bundle)
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.ManualOpenTip: Turning this off stops customer refresh and shop worker tasks.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.ScheduledOpenTip: When enabled, the shop only opens during the checked hours below.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.NoStorageSelected: Select a storage building to manage it separately.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopManager.StorageHintLine: This page shows the current storage settings. Use "Manage storage" to edit them.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopService.Fail.ProviderWrongMap: Service building is not on this map
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopService.Fail.ToiletWrongMap: Toilet is not on this map
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomerArrival.ForceFailNoShopOrVe: Force refresh failed: this map has no open shop areas or vending machines.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomerArrival.ForceFailNoKinds: Force refresh failed: no available customer kind definitions.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomerArrival.ForceFailNoKindForC: Force refresh failed: no customer kinds can appear for the current time or weather.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomerArrival.ForceFailNoMatching: Force refresh failed: no customer kind matches the current shop or vending machine.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomerArrival.ShopArrivalMessage: A customer is heading to the shop. Current weather: {weather}
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomerArrival.VendingArrivalMessa: A customer is heading to vending machine: {machine}.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.Title: Custom customer registry
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.Description: CustomerKindDef is read-only. Local player JSON is loaded after Defs and participates in natural customer spawning as runtime customer kinds.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.ExportInfo: This text contains player custom customer kinds.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.SourceCustom: Source: local player JSON. Saving merges it into the runtime customer directory.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.SourceDef: Source: CustomerKindDef. You can inspect data here, but you cannot edit the Def.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.SelectedPawnKinds: Selected PawnKinds, use the right side to append more.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.CannotModifyPawnKind: Def customers cannot modify PawnKinds at runtime.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.NoModifyDefPreferenc: Runtime will not modify Def preferences.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.AppendPreferences: Custom customers can append preferred items.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.BuiltInProfiles: Configured profiles in the Def. Empty uses the base configuration.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.ProfilesTip: Profiles let one kind vary budget, patience, time, weather, target types, and preferences.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.PreferenceWeightTip: Preference items increase purchase weight and can be adjusted directly.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.SaveSuccess: Custom customer registry saved, runtime customer directory rebuilt.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.ReloadConfirm: Reloading will discard current unsaved custom customer changes. Continue?
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.ImportInfo: Importing will overwrite all local custom customer data, but it will not modify any CustomerKindDef.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomCustomer.ImportSuccess: Custom customer data imported and local content overwritten.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.Title: Custom goods registry
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.Description: GoodsDef entries are read-only. Local player JSON is loaded after Defs and merged into the runtime goods directory.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.SourceDef: Source: GoodsDef. You can append custom goods, but the original content remains locked.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.SourceCustom: Source: player custom data. Name, goods list, and deletion are editable.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.LockedTip: Locked means original Def goods. Custom means player-added and removable.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.DuplicateCategory: A goods category with that name already exists.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.EmptyCategoryName: Goods category name cannot be empty.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.DeleteConfirm: Delete this custom category and all its custom goods links?
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ItemAlreadyExists: That item is already in the current category.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.SaveSuccess: Custom goods registry saved, runtime goods directory rebuilt.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ReloadConfirm: Reloading will discard current unsaved custom goods changes. Continue?
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ExportInfo: This text contains player custom goods categories and goods, ready to share with other players.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ImportReplaceInfo: Replace mode overwrites all local player custom goods data with the imported content, but does not modify any GoodsDef.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ImportMergeInfo: Merge mode keeps local categories and links, then appends imported content by category ID.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ImportReplaceSuccess: Custom goods data imported and local content overwritten.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ImportMergeSuccess: Custom goods data merged into local content.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.ReplaceModeTip: Replace local custom goods with imported content.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomGoods.MergeModeTip: Keep local content and append imported content.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.EditorDescription: Changes are shown on the map sign in real time. Images are copied into the local gallery; saves only store references.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.SingleGraphicHelp: This sign Def has only one base texture, so the editor shows only the face actually used on the map.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.WestMirrorHelp: When the building faces west, it reuses east-face data and mirrors it on the map.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.SelectLayerHint: Select a layer to edit position, scale, and angle
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.MaxLayerReached: This face can only hold 10 images.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.ExportInfo: This text contains the current sign face layers and image content. Other players importing it will save those images into their local gallery.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.ShareTextCopied: Sign share text copied to clipboard.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.ImportInfo: Importing replaces the current sign's south, east, and north faces, and saves images from the share text into the local gallery.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.ImportImageFromPathInfo: Supports png, jpg, and jpeg. Imported images are resized proportionally to max side 256 pixels and saved as local gallery PNG files.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.ImageImported: Image imported into the sign gallery.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.Gizmo.EditDesc: Open the sign editor and configure south, east, and north image layers.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.Gizmo.ExportDesc: Export the current three-face sign pattern. Share text includes used images.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.Gizmo.ImportDesc: Import sign setup from another player's share text and sync images into the local gallery.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Title: Local shop blueprints
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Description: Select a rectangle on the current map to save every building, floor, roof, shop-zone cell, storage goods setup, sign layers, service setup, and business component setting inside it. Real stock and stored register silver are not written into the blueprint.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.MaxSizeTip: Limits the selected rectangle width and height. This limit is controlled by a code constant for later adjustment.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Empty: No local shop blueprints yet. Click "Select and save", then drag a rectangle on the map.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.DeleteConfirm: Delete this local shop blueprint? Its JSON and preview image will be removed from this machine.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.SelectRectHint: Drag a rectangle on the map to save the shop blueprint. Current max is {max}x{max}.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Designator.Label: Save shop blueprint
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Designator.Desc: Select a rectangle and save it as a local shop blueprint. Current max width and height is {max} cells.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Place.Hint: Choose the lower-left placement cell for the shop blueprint. The business manager UI will reopen after placement or cancel.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Title: Network blueprints
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Empty: No network blueprints match the current filters.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.DetailHint: Select a blueprint on the left to view details, then download, like, or copy its code.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.NoRequiredMods: This blueprint has no extra mod requirements.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.SteamStatusOfflin: Steam: not logged in or unreadable
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UploadTip: Upload this local blueprint to the online blueprint service with preview and required mod list.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UpdateTip: Overwrite the same network blueprint code with this local blueprint while keeping existing likes and download stats.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UploadAlreadyUplo: This local blueprint is already linked to a network blueprint code. Duplicate upload is disabled unless you intentionally republish it.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UploadNeedSteam: You must be logged into local Steam before uploading a network blueprint.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UpdateNeedSteam: You must be logged into local Steam before updating a network blueprint.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UploadSuccess: Blueprint uploaded to the online service.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.DownloadSuccess: Network blueprint imported into the local library.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.DeleteConfirm: Delete this blueprint you uploaded? Other players will no longer be able to download it.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.ReuploadConfirm: This local blueprint already has a network blueprint code. Continue and publish another network version?
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UpdateConfirm: Overwrite this network blueprint with the current local blueprint? The blueprint code will stay the same.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.ImportedCannotUpl: Blueprints imported from the network cannot be uploaded again directly. Save them as a new local blueprint first.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.UpdateNotOwner: Only blueprints uploaded and bound by your own Steam account can be updated.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Error.SteamNotLog: No local Steam login was detected.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Error.SteamIdUnav: Could not read the current SteamId.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Error.ServiceUnav: The network blueprint service is unavailable.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Error.CodeEmpty: Please enter a valid blueprint code.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Error.ListFailed: Failed to load the network blueprint list.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Error.DownloadByC: Failed to import by blueprint code: {message}
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Network.Error.ImportMissi: Required mods are missing, so this blueprint cannot be imported.
This blueprint cannot be imported because these mods are missing: {mods}
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Place.Designator.Label: Place shop blueprint
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Place.Designator.Desc: Choose the lower-left anchor and recreate the saved floors, buildings, shop zone, storage, and sign setup.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Error.NoZone: No shop area is available to save.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Error.TooLarge: The selected area is {width}x{height}, above the current {max}x{max} limit.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Place.Error.OutOfBounds: The shop blueprint would exceed the map bounds.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Edit.Title: Edit shop blueprint
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Edit.Name: Blueprint name
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Edit.CanvasTip: Click a building in the virtual space to select it, then drag it to move its blueprint position. Floors and shop-zone cells can still be deleted from the lists below.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Edit.NoSelection: Click a building in the virtual space, then drag it to adjust its position inside the blueprint.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Edit.BuildingsTip: Deleting a building element prevents this blueprint from placing that building plan or applying its storage and sign setup.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Edit.TerrainsTip: Deleting a floor element prevents this blueprint from placing that floor plan.
LanguageData.RSMF.Blueprint.Edit.ZoneCellsTip: Deleting shop-zone cells removes them from the shop area created by this blueprint.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.Error.UnsupportedImageFo: Only png, jpg, and jpeg images are supported.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.Error.BadShareText: Sign share text format is invalid.
LanguageData.RSMF.CustomSign.Error.ShareImageDecodeFa: Share package contains an image that cannot be decoded: {label}
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Gizmo.Label: Manage stand
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Gizmo.Desc: Open the collectible display stand panel to choose slot collectibles, review hauling state, and unload displayed collectibles.
Open the god mode placement tool to adjust collectible render positions and export XML slot defaults.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Grid.Title: Display slots
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Grid.EmptyT: Empty slot. Click to choose a collectible on the current map.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Detail.Busi: Collectibles are displayed using the stand's default slot positions.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Detail.Stor: Displaying: {thing}. You can unload it and choose another collectible.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Detail.Pend: A pawn will haul {source} to this slot.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Detail.Empt: Choose a collectible on the current map to create a hauling job.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Detail.Norm: Display positions come from XML slot defaults. Transform sliders are only shown in developer mode with god mode enabled.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Menu.NoSour: No RimSim collectible is available on the current map.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Debug.Title: Display stand slot placement
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Debug.Subti: Shown only in developer mode with god mode enabled. Exported XML can be written into the stand Def as default parameters.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Error.SlotO: This slot already contains a collectible.
LanguageData.RSMF.CollectibleDisplayStand.Error.Inval: Only RimSim Framework collectibles can be selected.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopService.Fail.DisplayStandEmpty: The collectible display stand has no displayed collectibles.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Shops.Label: Shop management
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Shops.Description: Business manager page for shop management.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Vending.Label: Vending
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Vending.Descriptio: Business manager page for vending machines.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Finance.Label: Finance
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Finance.Descriptio: Business manager page for finance reports.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Reviews.Label: Customer reviews
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Reviews.Descriptio: Business manager page for customer reviews.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.CollectibleExchang: Business manager page for collectible exchange lists.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Blueprints.Label: Blueprints
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Blueprints.Descrip: Business manager page for shop blueprints.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Customers.Label: Customers
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Customers.Descript: Business manager page for active customers.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Staff.Label: Staff
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Main.Staff.Description: Business manager page for shop staff.
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Shop.Overview.Label: Overview
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Shop.Goods.Label: Goods
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Shop.Services.Label: Services
LanguageData.RSMF.ShopUi.Page.Shop.ComboEdit.Label: Combo editor
